memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Porter Jr Notes - husband of Elizabeth Cox
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Porter was born in 1620 in England. He was the son of Robert Porter (1590-?) and Jane (Godfrey) Porter (1600-?).


Robert Porter arrived in Virginia in 1647: Primary Immigrant: Porter, Robert A …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cox於大約1633年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，她的父親William Coxe36歲，母親Elizabeth Hutchins22歲。她於1648年與Robert Porter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年在她的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cox于大约1633年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，她的父亲William Coxe36岁，母亲Elizabeth Hutchins22岁。她于1648年与Robert Porter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年在她的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Cocke and Cook , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Ulster): mistranslation of Mac Con Coille (‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’), as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.
Dutch and Flemish: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Cock, a vernacular short form of Cornelius .

variants.name: Cocke
meanings: nickname from Middle English cok (Old English and Old French coc) ‘rooster’.
patronymic from the Old French and Middle English personal name Cok, of uncertain origin but perhaps derived from the word in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cox was born about 1633, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, William Coxe, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Hutchins, was 22. She married Robert Porter in 1648, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1690, in her hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cox est née environ 1633, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Coxe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hutchins, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Porter en 1648, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1690, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Sie hat 1648 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Robert Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1690 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cox(이)가 대략 1633년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Coxe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hutchins(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Robert Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Porter em 1648, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1690, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colon: варина, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cox родилась около 1633 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Coxe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hutchins, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Porter в 1648 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1690 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.
